RTDE Reference Program

EN KO
RTDE Reference Program

English-only documentation for the reference dashboard, digital twin, current-window monitor, and Python RTDE API.

Reference program notice. This repository is intended for inspection, integration, learning, and validation. It is not a certified safety product and must not be the only protective measure.

Screenshots

Quick links

Getting started Install, configure one robot IP, and launch the web interface. Web interface guide Panels, screenshots, recommended field sets, and monitoring workflow. Python API guide Read RTDE fields, write GP registers, and use the class-based API. RTDE background Recipes, GP input vs output, frequency trade-offs, and naming rules.
